def negative_repeated_open_read_close_of_same_small_file_in_single_workflow():
    rule_id = "repeated_open_read_close_of_same_small_file_in_single_workflow"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag workflows that reopen the same file many times instead of caching its contents or handle."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
